name: questplus
description: Info on Meta Horizon+, its game catalogues, benefits, and pricing

blocks.text: Meta Horizon+
The pages below explain Meta Horizon+, including its monthly games, separate Games and Indie Catalogues, member add-ons, and Xbox Game Pass Starter benefits.
Summary
Meta Horizon+ includes two monthly games to claim, a rotating Games Catalogue, a separate Indie Catalogue (Beta), member deals and add-ons, plus Xbox Game Pass Starter benefits in supported regions.
Monthly Games
Horizon+ members can claim two games selected by Meta each month. Claimed monthly games remain available while the membership is active and return if the member resubscribes.
Game / Indie Catalogues

**Games Catalogue**
A curated, rotating selection of established VR games. You can redeem and play each title while it remains in the Games Catalogue and you have an active Horizon+ membership.

Current Games Catalogue:
https://www.meta.com/experiences/section/746836817401205/

**Indie Catalogue (Beta)**
A separate rotating catalogue focused on emerging apps, hidden gems, and games that haven't reached the Store's top-selling charts. You can redeem and play each title while it remains in the Indie Catalogue and you have an active Horizon+ membership.

Current Indie Catalogue:
https://www.meta.com/experiences/section/3170833353093973/
Membership Deals
Horizon+ members may receive exclusive Store deals. Available games, discounts, and promotions change over time and may vary by region.

pages.name: do-i-keep-my-games-after-cancell
pages.title: Do I keep my games after cancelling?

blocks.text: Do I keep my games after cancelling?

When a Horizon+ membership ends, access to membership content ends too. Previously claimed monthly games become available again if you resubscribe. Catalogue games are only playable while your membership is active and the game remains in its catalogue. Xbox Game Pass Starter benefits also require an active, eligible membership.
Game Trials

As of February 2025, Meta Quest + now occasionally offers Game Trials! These are random, and completely up to Meta, but they last for up to 2 weeks.
To check if there is a current trial, check your Meta Quest + dashboard.
Member Add-Ons

In supported regions, Horizon+ members receive bonus add-on content each month. Recent benefits have included Walkabout Mini Golf courses, which are regular DLCs also available for purchase, and exclusive Ug cosmetic bundles that haven't returned to the Store. Available add-ons, redemption methods, and eligibility may vary by month and region.

pages.name: do-i-get-the-rift-versions-of-th
pages.title: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?

blocks.text: Do I get the Rift Versions of these games?
At this moment, no. However this can change in the future.
Xbox Game Pass Starter

In supported regions, Horizon+ includes Xbox Game Pass Starter through the Xbox app on Quest. It offers more than 50 flat-screen games and up to **10 hours of cloud gaming per month**. Select supported games can also be downloaded for unlimited play on compatible devices.

A Microsoft/Xbox profile and suitable internet connection are required for cloud play. A standard Bluetooth gamepad can be paired with Quest; Touch-controller gamepad emulation is also being introduced.
Pricing and Trial
In the US, Horizon+ costs **$7.99 per month** or **$59.99 per year**. Eligible new members may receive a one-month trial. Pricing, availability, and trial eligibility vary by country and account.
